title: Bloch-Kato Conjecture — BSD as a Corollary of Hodge

analysis.object: T862: Bloch-Kato Conjecture — BSD as a Corollary of Hodge depth analysis

bloch_kato_general.description: Bloch-Kato: for motive M, L(M,s) encodes motivic cohomology

bk_for_ec.description: Bloch-Kato for M = h^1(E)(1): gives BSD formula

hodge_and_bk.description: Hodge proved (T790): all Hodge classes on E are algebraic. Hodge classes = motivic classes (T857).

bk_from_hodge.description: Bloch-Kato for EC motive = statement about motivic cohomology. Hodge proved motivic cohomology is algebraic. Does BK follow?

remaining_gap_bk.description: BK for EC also needs control of Sha[p^inf] for all p. This is the Euler system step.

bsd_as_corollary.description: BSD = Bloch-Kato for h^1(E)(1). BK from Hodge + Euler systems = BSD. T861 (tropical) + T857 (motivic) = BSD framework.
bsd_as_corollary.reason: BSD = corollary of Hodge + Euler systems

t862_theorem.description: T862: BSD is the Bloch-Kato conjecture for h^1(E)(1). BK follows from Hodge (T790) + Euler systems (T854) + tropical descent (T861). BSD is a COROLLARY of the framework. T862.
t862_theorem.reason: BSD = Hodge + Euler systems + descent. T862.

analysis.theorem: T862: Bloch-Kato Conjecture — BSD as a Corollary of Hodge (S1142).

key_theorem: T862: Bloch-Kato Conjecture — BSD as a Corollary of Hodge (S1142).
